fields.label: Default Reminder Policy
fields.description: Policy used when a lease does not specify one explicitly.

fields.label: Expiring Soon Threshold (Days)
fields.description: Number of days before expiry when a lease is considered expiring soon.

fields.label: Document Expiring Soon Threshold (Days)
fields.description: Number of days before expiry when a lease document needs attention.

fields.label: Default Currency
fields.description: Fallback currency for new records when one is not specified.

fields.label: Timezone
fields.description: Timezone used for scheduled tasks and reminder timing.

fields.label: Email Sender
fields.description: Default sender address used for reminder emails.

fields.label: Reminder Retry Limit
fields.description: Maximum number of resend attempts for a failed reminder.

fields.label: Administrator Error Recipients
fields.description: Comma-separated recipients for reminder delivery failures.

fields.label: Create Renewal Request at First Threshold
fields.description: Automatically create a renewal request when the first reminder threshold is reached.

fields.label: Enable Weekly Management Digest
fields.description: Send a weekly summary of expiries, approvals, overdue payments, reminder failures, and rent exposure.

fields.label: Weekly Digest Recipients
fields.description: Comma-separated email addresses that receive the weekly management summary.
